raw_consumer_statement:
Dear Sir/Madam, I am writing to submit a further complaint regarding Barclays Bank , following Complaint ID XXXX, which I filed on XX/XX/year>. 

I recently received a response from XXXX at Barclays stating that the investigation may take up to two billing cycles, not exceeding 90 days. However, I was previously told by Barclays that the investigation would take 710 business days. It has now been a month, and I find it unreasonable that verifying proof of a deposited convenience check should take so long. 

Additionally, I contacted Barclays in XXXX regarding a convenience check I had never received or deposited. At that time, a Barclays representative informed me that the check was fraudulent and that the bank would notify XXXX  of the incident. Since then, I have not received any meaningful updates or resolution. 

I am not satisfied with how Barclays has handled this issue. It appears the bank is not acting in the best interest of consumers, nor is it demonstrating a commitment to resolving legitimate concerns in a timely manner.
